articles.title: Church News podcast: Responsible and principled use of AI
articles.description: Deseret News reporter Tad Walch talks about AI and principles he has learned while covering Elder Gerrit W. Gong
articles.content: In recent years, artificial intelligence has moved from being a concept illustrated in science fiction books and movies to being something that many individuals use on a daily basis. Elder Gerrit W. Gong of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles has spoke... [517 chars]

articles.title: Exclusive: US holds off blacklisting China's DeepSeek, more than 100 firms deemed security risks, sources say
articles.description: The U.S. has held ​off adding China’s AI startup DeepSeek, memory chipmaker CXMT and more than 100 other companies flagged as national security risks to a trade blacklist, according to two people familiar ‌with the matter, as the Trump administration tries to avoid escalating tensions with Beijing.
articles.content: June 16 (Reuters) - The U.S. has held ​off adding China’s AI startup DeepSeek, memory chipmaker CXMT and more than 100 other companies flagged as national security risks to a trade blacklist, according to two people familiar ‌with the matter, as the ... [4834 chars]

articles.title: The Smartest Way to Play the AI Boom in 2026
articles.description: Power has become the binding constraint on the AI boom, and one $130 million stock just signed a 15-year, $2.6 billion lease that validates the entire thesis. Wall Street hasn't priced it yet.
articles.content:
If you've been investing in the AI boom, you probably own most of the same names everyone else does.
NVIDIA for the chips. Microsoft, Google and Amazon for the cloud. Maybe Meta for the consumer side. Maybe Palantir or one of the AI software names. P... [18959 chars]

articles.title: How to Pass an AI Agent’s Security Check Before It Kills Your Deal
articles.description: Business discovery is shifting toward "agent-to-agent" marketing, where AI agents evaluate a company's trust signals, documentation, integrations and credibility before human buyers ever see the shortlist.
articles.content: Picture a founder who runs a promising software company. Solid product, happy customers, decent website. One day, a Fortune 500 company in her exact target market goes looking for a vendor that does precisely what she does. She never gets a call. She... [7661 chars]

articles.title: SpaceX overtakes Microsoft to become 4th-largest US company
articles.description: spacex continued its extraordinary stock market rally on tuesday, surpassing microsoft to become the fourth-largest company in the united states by market capitalisation, while also unveiling a major $60 billion acquisition of artificial intelligence coding platform cursor. the elon musk-led aerospace and technology company saw its shares rise around 8 per cent during early trading, pushing its market value to approximately $2.74 trillion. the gain placed spacex ahead of microsoft and further widened its le
articles.content:
